entities.name: PLANT PARASITIC NEMATODES
entities.description: Nematodes that associate with and potentially constrain pigeonpea and chickpea

entities.name: HETERODERA CAJANI
entities.description: A plant parasitic nematode found to be important on pigeonpea

entities.name: ROTYLENCHULUS RENIFORMIS
entities.description: A plant parasitic nematode found to be important on both pigeonpea and chickpea

entities.name: PRATYLENCHUS SPP
entities.description: Lesion nematodes found to be important on chickpea

entities.name: ROOT-KNOT NEMATODES
entities.description: Nematodes that were not found to be important on the studied crops in Vidarbha
